category_sources: Official mlpack homepage https://www.mlpack.org/ describes mlpack as a fast, header-only C++ machine learning library with bindings to Python, Julia, R, Go, and the command line.
source_facts.description says mlpack is a scalable C++ machine learning library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://www.mlpack.org/ uses the project name mlpack.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted at https://www.mlpack.org/doc/.
Official mlpack homepage https://www.mlpack.org/ links to Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official mlpack homepage https://www.mlpack.org/ links to GitHub, and the official repository is https://github.com/mlpack/mlpack.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://www.mlpack.org/ says it is header-only and has command-line bindings.
source_facts.description identifies a scalable C++ machine learning library.
